---
toc: false
---
::: {.text-center .px-5}
::: {.display-3 .hbcloser}
Research Support Handbook
:::
::: {.h3 .pb-2 .fw-semibold}
Your guide towards good data and software management practices
:::
All information is curated by VU staff and updated on a daily basis
:::

---

::: {.text-center .px-5}
::: {.h3}
Topics, Guides and Tools
:::
:::

::: {.text-center .px-5}
::: {.column width=30% .px-1}
[![](public/home-collab.svg){width=5em}](./topics.qmd)  
[Topics](./topics.qmd)

A quick way to learn about specific topics
:::
::: {.column width=30% .px-1}
[![](public/home-collab-green.svg){width=5em}](./guides.qmd)  
[Guides](./guides.qmd)

Guide you through data and software management practices
:::
::: {.column width=30% .px-1}
[![](public/home-collab-purple.svg){width=5em}](./tools.qmd)  
[Tools](./tools.qmd)

How to use VU-supported software tools
:::
:::

---

::: {.text-center .px-5}
::: {.h3}
Related Trainings and Events
:::
The VU network Research Data Support organizes trainings that will help you develop your data management and coding skills.

::: {.column width=40% .px-1}
[![](public/home-collab.svg){width=5em}](./topics/events.qmd)  
[Calendar](./topics/events.qmd)
:::
::: {.column width=40% .px-1}
[![](public/home-collab.svg){width=5em}](./topics/trainings.qmd)  
[Trainings](./topics/trainings.qmd)
:::
:::

::: {.column-screen .blue}
::: {.column-body}
::: {.text-center .px-5 .py-5}
::: {.column width=40% .px-1}
[![](public/home-collab.svg){width=5em}](./topics/events.qmd)  
[Missing Something?](./topics/events.qmd)
:::
::: {.column width=40% .px-1}
[![](public/home-collab.svg){width=5em}](./topics/trainings.qmd)  
[Contact RDM Support Desk](./topics/trainings.qmd)
:::
:::
:::
:::
